titles_female: The MovieLens dataset was used to train the model.
The MovieLens dataset is a collection of movie ratings from a large online movie rating system.
The dataset contains 100,000 ratings from 1,000 users on 9,000 movies.
The ratings are on a 5-point scale (1-5).
The dataset is divided into training and testing sets.
The model is a collaborative filtering-based recommender system.
It uses a matrix factorization technique to reduce the dimensionality of the user-item interaction matrix.
